# konnect_identity_provider_team_group_mapping (Resource)

IdentityProviderTeamGroupMapping Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_identity_provider_team_group_mapping" "my_identityproviderteamgroupmapping" {
  group                = "Tech Leads"
  identity_provider_id = "d32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
  team_id              = "6801e673-cc10-498a-94cd-4271de07a0d3"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (String) The identity provider group name. Group names are case sensitive. Requires replacement if changed.
- `identity_provider_id` (String) ID of the identity provider. Requires replacement if changed.
- `team_id` (String) The Konnect team ID to associate with the identity provider group. Requires replacement if changed.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity creation date.
- `id` (String) ID of the team group mapping.
- `updated_at` (String) An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity update date.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect_identity_provider_team_group_mapping.my_konnect_identity_provider_team_group_mapping
  id = jsonencode({
    id                   = "7f9fd312-a987-4628-b4c5-bb4f4fddd5f7"
    identity_provider_id = "d32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect_identity_provider_team_group_mapping.my_konnect_identity_provider_team_group_mapping '{"id": "7f9fd312-a987-4628-b4c5-bb4f4fddd5f7", "identity_provider_id": "d32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"}'
```
